title: schoenus minutulus
intro: Schoenus minutulus, also known as the small club-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Schoenus minutulus include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, as well as relieving respiratory problems like bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
